ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network session */,
  "timestamp_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp of the session in UTC */,
  "client_ip_block" TEXT /* Client IP block involved in the session */,
  "asn_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ASN associated with the session */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the session originated */,
  "nat_status" TEXT /* NAT (Network Address Translation) status of the session */,
  "outbound_private_status" TEXT /* Status of outbound private traffic */,
  "outbound_private_status_1" TEXT /* Additional status of outbound private traffic */,
  "outbound_routable_status" TEXT /* Status of outbound routable traffic */,
  "outbound_routable_status_1" TEXT /* Additional status of outbound routable traffic */,
  "adj_spoof_prefix_len" TEXT /* Length of adjacent spoofed prefix */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results or report of the session */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used in the session (e.g., TCP, UDP, ICMP) */,
  "packet_capture" TEXT /* Packet capture data for the session */,
  "packet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet capture data */,
  "packet_count" INTEGER /* Number of packets in the capture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_sessions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_sessions_outbound_routable_status FOREIGN KEY ("outbound_routable_status") REFERENCES traffic_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_sessions_asn_id FOREIGN KEY ("asn_id") REFERENCES asns ("asn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_sessions_outbound_private_status_1 FOREIGN KEY ("outbound_private_status_1") REFERENCES traffic_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_sessions_outbound_private_status FOREIGN KEY ("outbound_private_status") REFERENCES traffic_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_sessions_outbound_routable_status_1 FOREIGN KEY ("outbound_routable_status_1") REFERENCES traffic_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_sessions_adj_spoof_prefix_len FOREIGN KEY ("adj_spoof_prefix_len") REFERENCES spoof_prefixes ("prefix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_sessions_results FOREIGN KEY ("results") REFERENCES session_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asns" (
  "asn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ASN */,
  "asn_number" TEXT /* ASN number (e.g., 6128) */,
  "asn_name" TEXT /* Name of the ASN (e.g., CABLE-NET-1) */,
  "asn_description" TEXT /* Description of the ASN */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., usa) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country (e.g., United States) */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Region of the country (e.g., North America) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_blocks" (
  "ip_block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP block */,
  "ip_block" TEXT /* IP block (e.g., 24.188.8.x/24) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IP block */,
  "asn_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ASN associated with the IP block */,
  "ip_block_type" TEXT /* Type of IP block (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_blocks_asn_id FOREIGN KEY ("asn_id") REFERENCES asns ("asn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic status (e.g., blocked, allowed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoof_prefixes" (
  "prefix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spoofed prefix */,
  "prefix_length" TEXT /* Length of the spoofed prefix (e.g., none, 24) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spoofed prefix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prefix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., Report) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network session being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the session */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the session was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES network_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_classification" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic classification */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network session being classified */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic classification (e.g., HTTP, HTTPS, FTP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_classification_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES network_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threats" (
  "threat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat */,
  "threat_name" TEXT /* Name of the threat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threat */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the threat (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_threats" (
  "session_threat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session threat */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network session with the threat */,
  "threat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threat detected in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_threat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_threats_threat_id FOREIGN KEY ("threat_id") REFERENCES threats ("threat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_threats_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES network_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client configuration */,
  "ip_block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP block */,
  "asn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ASN */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the client configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_configurations_asn_id FOREIGN KEY ("asn_id") REFERENCES asns ("asn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_configurations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_configurations_ip_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_block_id") REFERENCES ip_blocks ("ip_block_id")
)
